# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID."
      }
    },
    "objectId1": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID for the first application or service principal."
      }
    },
    "objectId2": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID for the second application or service principal."
      }
    },
    "objectId3": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID for the third application or service principal."
      }
    },
    "objectId4": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID for the fourth application or service principal."
      }
    },
    "objectId5": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID for the fifth application or service principal."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {},
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-02-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": true,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": true,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": true,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectId1')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectId2')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectId3')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectId4')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('objectId5')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          }
        ],
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-02-01').vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
